---
filters:
  - editable
  - arrows
---

## Slide 1 — Two absolute arrows

{{< arrow from="100,200" to="400,200" position="absolute" >}}

{{< arrow from="314.2,412.8" to="182.6,139.3" color="red" width="3" position="absolute" >}}

## Slide 2 — Inline arrow only

An inline arrow {{< arrow from="0,0" to="50,50" >}} embedded in a paragraph.

## Slide 3 — Absolute arrow with unsupported kwargs

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="200,150" bend="left" position="absolute" >}}
